fact: Companies House records for SATURDAY NIGHT FROM NOWHERE LTD (company number 12073159) list two directors identified only by date of birth (January 1978 and September 1978) and addresses, with no names matching 'Andrew Spence' visible in the public officer listing. The domain snfn.co.uk resolves to Saturday Night From Nowhere's live website. The sign-up data (organisation name 'Andrew Spence', email andy@snfn.co.uk) is an internal CRM observation and cannot be independently confirmed from public sources, but the Companies House gap is confirmed.
